_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Mosquito Valley Taming. Canon event: Wang Lin tames the Mosquito Beast swarm via Dream Dao in Mosquito Valley. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Mosquito Valley Taming
canon_event: Wang Lin tames the Mosquito Beast swarm via Dream Dao in Mosquito Valley
why_untaken: Mosquito Valley is extremely dangerous; requires Core Formation+ to survive.
natural_next_event: The ancient queen continues cultivating; swarm grows.

karmic_weight.description: Taming the Mosquito Beast swarm creates a permanent soul-bond

consequences.description: Mosquito Beast Queen becomes Wang Lin's companion
Wang Lin gains continent-scale destructive capability
